commit.message:
Initial scaffold: workspace with core, shm, mkt_run, client crates

Workspace structure with src/ (production) and fake/ (prototypes).
- core: InstrumentKey (36-byte fixed), tick types, config loader, dynamic idx tables, multipliers
- shm: mmap regions with futex wake/wait, single-writer ring buffer, multi-reader
- mkt_run: daemon binary loading .prms config, connecting to IB gateways via ibapi sync
- client: user-side library placeholder (no IB dependency)
- fake/tick_encode: working demo of tick encoding
- Zero hardcode: all config via .prms JSON files next to binary

commit.message:
Add comprehensive new project checklist (#2)

NEW_PROJECT_CHECKLIST.md provides everything needed to bootstrap a new
project with full FGT methodology:

- Core documentation setup (FGT.md, PATTERNS, REVIEWS, BUG_PATTERNS)
- Test infrastructure with 8 category structure (BUILD, INV, CONTRACT,
  SENS, EVAL, BOUND, SCHEMA, INT)
- PREFIX-NNN naming convention for tests
- Registry pattern for both JS/TS and Python
- CI pipeline templates (GitHub Actions)
- 5 Prevention Principles initialization
- Testing targets by complexity (0.1-0.5 tests/function)
- Meta-improvement setup (METHODOLOGY_LOG.md)
- Domain knowledge template
- Sync process for FGT updates
- Contributing back workflow

Also updated README.md to reference the new checklist.

Co-authored-by: Bam B. Bam <gitbam@belisarius.33mail.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(production-closure): fix vercel.json routing conflict + add freshness headers + operator runbook (#333)

- Replace legacy `routes` key with `redirects` (Vercel: when `routes` is
  present, `headers` and `rewrites` are silently ignored — security headers
  were NOT being served in production)
- Add `Cache-Control: no-store` for `/sw-register.js` (must always be
  fresh to ensure SW cleanup runs after every deploy)
- Add `Cache-Control: no-store` for `/index.html` (belt-and-suspenders
  freshness for SPA entry point)
- `/sw.js` now redirects 308 → `/` instead of returning 410; browser
  cannot install a redirect target as a service worker (same protection,
  compatible with modern Vercel routing API)
- Add docs/OPERATOR_RUNBOOK.md: single canonical runbook with deploy
  triggers, required secret names, freshness verification commands,
  first-check triage, and rollback steps

https://claude.ai/code/session_01NiueuT2s6xFY3eScCjk8Ps

Co-authored-by: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

Increase chat assistant maxOutputTokens from 2048 to 65536

Gemini 2.5 Flash is a thinking model that uses internal reasoning tokens
counted against maxOutputTokens. With 2048, complex questions consumed
~96% of the budget on thinking, leaving only ~80 tokens for the visible
response — causing truncated answers (e.g. one sentence then nothing).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix 413 error: move githubRepos to computed property with caching

The 314-repo array was being serialized as a Livewire public property
on every request, exceeding the request body limit. Now githubRepos
is a computed property cached for 5 minutes, only passed to Alpine
via @js() during render — not sent back on subsequent requests.

feat(ui): apply dark neon theme across entire application

Comprehensive dark theme overhaul covering 199 files:

- Root layout: bg-gray-950 text-white antialiased
- DashboardLayout: dark bg, dark sidebar, dark user dropdown
- globals.css: NFV theme vars updated to dark palette
- New lib/design/theme.ts: centralized design tokens
- All 120+ pages converted from light to dark neon
- All 80+ components converted (cards, inputs, buttons, modals)
- Layouts: authenticated, protected, onboarding all dark
- NFV components: AuroraBackground, GlassCard, NFVHeader dark

Transformation pattern:
  bg-white → bg-gray-900/80 | bg-gray-950
  text-gray-900 → text-white

- Top products table, employee performance (admin only)
- Stat cards with period comparison (growth/decline arrows)

Cross-cutting:
- Sidebar config updated for all 10 activity templates
- App.tsx routing for customers, promotions, reports pages

Replace client-side row pagination with SQL aggregation and add date filter

Supabase caps at 1000 rows per request, so the 50k page size only read
1000 rows (showing 2 of 35 breeds). Created saleyard_stats() SQL function
to aggregate server-side. Added date range filter buttons (1mo to 3yr)
to the Saleyard Status tab.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(auth): remove stale subscription_tier/status from create_personal_project

Migration 042 dropped billing columns from the projects table, but
create_personal_project() still passed subscription_tier and
subscription_status to the Project constructor. This caused a TypeError
on new user registration (including Google OAuth signup), returning a
500 Internal Server Error.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: worker loop sleeps when all items waiting for backoff — stops queue balloon

Worker was spinning at ~300 dequeue/nack cycles per 30s backoff window per item.
With 4000+ PlexNotFound items all in backoff, this saturated the loop and prevented
new items from being processed. Now tracks consecutive not-ready nacks and sleeps
until earliest retry_at (clamped 1-30s) when all items are waiting.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix iOS build for Xcode 16.4 + add pagination and family system

Expo SDK 55 targets Xcode 26+ but our build uses Xcode 16.4 (Swift 6.1.2).
Three categories of incompatibilities were patched:

1. ExpoModulesCore: @MainActor on protocol conformance is Xcode 26-only
   syntax — removed from SwiftUIHostingView.swift and ViewDefinition.swift

2. expo-router/expo-image-picker/expo-image: iOS 26 SDK APIs
   (UIBarButtonItem.Badge, PHAsset.contentType, SymbolEffect.drawOn)
   wrapped in #if compiler(>=6.2) compile-time guards

3. Podfile: Swift 5 language mode + minimal concurrency for all pods
   so actor-isolation violations become warnings instead of errors

Also includes:
- Server pagination on all 11 list endpoints (page/limit/offset)
- Family invite system API client and React hooks
- Rewritten onboarding invite screen with share/join modes
- Auto-patch script (scripts/patch-expo-xcode16.sh) runs via postinstall

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

v2.2 - Critical Bug Fix: Amount Numbers Deleted Instead of Replaced

🔥 CRITICAL FIX: Preserve currency units in amount masking
💡 Issue: Amount numbers were being deleted instead of replaced with [Amount]
✅ Root cause: YAML backreference syntax error

What was fixed:
✅ Corrected YAML backreference syntax from '\1 [Amount]' to '\1 [Amount]'
✅ Fixed sanitizer.py to use m.expand() for backreference support
✅ Added m.expand() to correctly process captured groups in replacements

Technical Details:
- YAML parses '\1' as string '\1' (one backslash + 1)
- Python's m.expand('\1') expands to captured group content (e.g., USD)
- Final result: USD 500,000 → USD [Amount] (preserves USD)

Enhancements:
✅ Vietnam address support: Plot + Industrial Park format
✅ Hong Kong full address support: Unit + Floor + Building + Road
✅ Fixed "reference only"误匹配
✅ Fixed "identify" verb误识别
✅ Disabled internal_reference_code (误匹配18个普通单词)
✅ Use English replacement词 [Amount] for English contracts

Tested with:
- Joint Venture Contract-Vietnam 20260226.docx
- Three amounts correctly replaced: USD 1,000,000 / USD 350,000 / USD 650,000
- All addresses correctly identified and masked

  - 業務種別（ID・説明・分類キーワード）
  - 影響度（ID・定義・分類キーワード）
